description: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web console is open. Log in (User: admin, Pass: admin) if not already logged in. Your goal is to create a specific security alert for a critical workstation. Create an active alert profile named 'SWIFT Terminal Access' with the description 'Monitor all logons to the SWIFT payment terminal'. The alert must have a 'High' or 'Critical' severity and be categorized under 'Logon Audit' (or User Logon). Configure the alert to trigger on 'Success' events specifically when the 'Client Machine Name' (or Workstation Name) contains 'SWIFT-TERM-01'.
